violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Food items in prep cooler and walk-in found not dated.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Condenser leaking in walk-in freezer. - Reach-in for servers condenser leaking on to floor.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - Test strips for dishwasher not found.
Linen storage. — --- Towels were being lined dried. Must be dried in a dryer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Floors in kitchen have holes in the floor that need repair
